author: @TomOsborn-h8f
text: I was also a healthcare provider with the feds and I  sympathize with this doctor. A disgruntled co-worker  told an Inspector General that my treatment of patients was like  " watching someone torture a baby".  My accusor thought she could  stab me in the back and get away with it  because  the IG told  her any accusation she made  would  be anonymous forever !!! .WRONG !!  I was relieved of my position while an investigation was carried out,   I was under a dark cloud  of suspicion by my  other coworkers and other patents. I was lynched in the press like this guy  because her accusations were leaked to the spoon-fed local press without talking to me  !!  BUT,  after long investigation,  I finally recieved a copy of her unredacted depositions lies . I finally  found out what   were the accusation against me and I FOUGHT BACK . I got my job back, restored my reputation and GOT HER FIRED !!!

replies.author: @jeromeschwartz4778
replies.text: @ellamaeloftus3493 , well ok , you say not fired , the fact is , low rating , less people watching her , and more likely she got a pay cut .. That's like someone working 40 hours a week , and the employer giving them 32 hours a week  and removing half their benefits .. And her then going back crying that they decreased her pay .. as she looks at one or two coworkers that still do 40 hours a week ... THAT part about getting less hours .. was only example only , but more like a reality of whats taking place at her work right now .. Have you been watching , then give me a list of all that have been removed , fired , switched over from doing day news to nights .. Why all of a sudden a shift in news channels .. Maybe because Disney is taking a lot of lawsuits for slandering news caster , and they cant afford those mistakes on the air .. She is one sided .. givers her one sided view points and doesn't leave it up to the people to decide what is wrong or what is right .. Yes so many are saying got fired .. you may be right .. But time will tell sooner then you know or may even admit to .. Basically she isn't fired .. BUT .. some people forget , and some people remember things  remember , Reid opened an April 2018 episode of AM Joy on MSNBC with what critics said was a non-apology apology in which she admitted she couldn’t prove she had been hacked, but stuck to her claim that she couldn’t remember writing the posts... When news anchors have to give a apology , its how the people except their apology .. And most people didn't except it ..  She is simple going down the drain because of her own actions taken .. And yes , her show has been canceled .. A new one is going to open up .. How big of a part will she play in the next news channel they open ..is the real question ... In other words , if she cant bring people back to the newer news channel .. Then of coarse she will end up not having a job in the near future to ANY NEWS NETWORK ... I dont see her newer show with high ratings .. Today they call this culture cancelling .. and what I see from her , soon she will be cancelled , if not today , maybe tomorrow ..By no means is she hurting , her net worth is 4 million .. A lawsuit could make her think twice to how she says things .. She cant simple spit out false facts , like its true ..

author: @lodrezzon
text:
MSNBC going down in flames was on my list to Santa last year! Yay! Only a few more wishes left : The end of Morning Joe and Mika, The View, and George Snuffleupagus.

As far as media I trust: YouTubers - Valiant Renegade, Megyn Kelly, Liz Wheeler, and CDN (for climate change stuff). Cable - Newsmax 

Beyond that, everyone else is more like opinion than news. Kind of like the video versions of 'The National Enquirer'

author: @tomjones6777
text: It should be taken very seriously that if an individual has the power of a megaphone, then they should be held accountable for the fairness of the content of their message.  What it seems is we have been impressed by the melodramatics and the superficial appeal of what is being said in a pseudo-authoritarian way.  Violating an unwitting public’s trust should be met with harshest of penalties- do not spare the rod.
